name: Pheasant with Cinnamon & Basil
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Finely chopped fresh basil leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 425°F.
2. Heat the oil in an oven-proof skillet over high heat, add the pheasant and brown well.
3. Discard the cooking fat in the skillet, then add onion, vinegar, tomato paste, chicken stock, salt, pepper, cinnamon stick, ground cinnamon, and basil leaves.
4. Bring to a boil, place in the oven, uncovered, and cook for 35 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven. Transfer the pheasant pieces to a platter and place the skillet over medium heat on the stove.
6. Cook until the liquid becomes saucelike. Remove from heat, add basil, and whisk in butter.
7. Pour the sauce over the pheasant and serve.
